description.initial: You stand at the sacred diving point, where generations of seekers have descended to meet the merfolk. The water below glows with light from sea creatures, welcoming lights from the Underwater Realm. Kira's crystal pulses warmly in your hand, ready to grant you the ability to breathe beneath the waves. One deep breath, one brave jump.
description.return: The dive point. The underwater lights still beckon from below.
description.atmospheric: The boundary between worlds is thin here. You can almost hear singing from beneath the waves.
